author: y4rr
content: W6: bump ferray-fft pin to 0.3.8 (W5 published the upstream fix) and retire ferrotorch's downstream Hermitian-projection mitigation. Delete project_hermitian_in_place / compute_linear_index / resolve_irfftn_axes. Replace two-staged irfftn body and hfft pre-projection with single direct ferray_fft calls. Conformance unchanged: 63/63 conformance_fft + 7/7 _probe_b7_a3 still pass.
